cross_domain_bonus_rationale: Mechanobiology (biophysics/materials science + cell biology) -> Epigenomics (molecular biology/genomics): spans 2+ disciplinary boundaries. All 5 surviving hypotheses bridge this gap. Canonical retrieval infrastructure (PubMed, KEGG, STRING) is bio-centric, creating systematic infrastructure penalty for biophysics-side claims; bonus compensates.

ranked_hypotheses.title: ECM Stiffness Coordinates a Dual-Enzyme Bivalent-to-Active Enhancer Switch via Concurrent KDM6B Activation and YAP-EP300 Recruitment
key_evolution_tasks: Reformulate with UTX (KDM6A) as primary/alternative enhancer demethylase candidate
Reframe as sequential two-phase model: Phase 1 = YAP-EP300 (minutes); Phase 2 = KDM6B/UTX (hours)
Add siKDM6B vs siKDM6A genetic disambiguation alongside GSK-J4

ranked_hypotheses.title: Stiffness-Induced Enhancer H3K27ac Creates Self-Sustaining Transcriptional Condensates That Persist as Mechanical Memory
key_evolution_tasks: Revise memory timescale from 24-72h to 6-12h (H3K27ac half-life constraint)
Reposition as short-term epigenetic bridge to longer-term DNA methylation memory
Specify bistability mechanism or explicitly acknowledge positive feedback requires sustained YAP-EP300

ranked_hypotheses.title: ECM Stiffness Rewires Enhancer-Promoter 3D Chromatin Loops via YAP-TEAD-Dependent NIPBL Recruitment and Cohesin Redistribution
key_evolution_tasks: Reframe as empirical dataset hypothesis rather than mechanistic discovery
Acknowledge CTCF dominance explicitly; position stiffness-driven loops as CTCF-permitted not CTCF-independent

ranked_hypotheses.title: ECM Stiffness Nucleates Mechanosensitive Super-Enhancers via YAP-Dependent BRD4/MED1 Phase Condensate Assembly
ranked_hypotheses.drop_reason: Novelty pre-empted by Zanconato 2018; phase separation model contested (McSwiggen 2019, Chong 2018); MED1 misattribution; 0-3 Elo record; 4th-lowest novelty score constrains composite despite high testability
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_note: May be worth reformulating WITHOUT phase separation (H3K27ac density + BRD4 occupancy alone) as a Cycle 2 hypothesis. Critic questions provide clear path.

ranked_hypotheses.title: Tissue-Specific ECM Stiffness Selects Tissue-Specific Enhancer Programs Through Differential YAP Nuclear Residence Time and EP300 Occupancy Kinetics
ranked_hypotheses.drop_reason: Conceptual flaw: YAP-TEAD targets shared proliferation/survival enhancers, not tissue-specific enhancers. Morphogen analogy fails structurally. Lowest groundedness score (3) reflects active contradiction with known biology. Not worth evolution slot.
ranked_hypotheses.evolution_note: Modest reframe (hierarchical TEAD enhancer activation at physiological stiffness values) is probably correct but unexciting. Prediction (d) likely false. Retire from this cycle.

diversity_check.note: Top 3 hypotheses address orthogonal questions about the mechanobiology-epigenomics interface: what switch occurs (H3), does it persist (H4), does it reorganize 3D architecture (H5). Distinct mechanisms, distinct subfields, distinct prediction types. No diversity adjustment required.

elo_tournament.diagnostic_note: C1-H1 has equal Testability (8) to H3/H4/H5 but 0-3 Elo record — confirms that high Testability alone does not create research priority when novelty is pre-empted by prior work. Linear composite slightly inflates C1-H1 relative to its pairwise priority; this is expected behavior noted for the Orchestrator.

critic_questions_forwarded_to_evolver.question: UTX (KDM6A), not KDM6B, is the canonical enhancer H3K27me3 demethylase via MLL3/4-COMPASS. Reformulate with UTX as primary candidate and add genetic disambiguation (siKDM6B vs siKDM6A).

YAP arrives 15-60 min vs KDM6B upregulation hours later. Reframe as sequential two-phase model: Phase 1 = YAP-EP300 acetylates accessible enhancers; Phase 2 = KDM6B/UTX resolves bivalent enhancers. How does sequential operation change predictions?
H3K27ac half-life ~2-6h. After YAP exits, what quantitative argument sustains H3K27ac for 24-72h? Revise to 6-12h memory timescale as short-term bridge to DNA methylation memory.

MRTF-SRF pathway (RhoA -> actin -> MRTF -> SRF -> CArG-box enhancers) is equally mechanosensitive and targets COMPLETELY DIFFERENT enhancers from YAP-TEAD. Does ECM stiffness simultaneously activate two independent enhancer programs (YAP-TEAD + MRTF-SRF)?
